description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, fetches submodules, installs dependencies, installs Rust, generates a build system with CMake, and builds the project. The build-windows job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository, fetches submodules, installs Rust, downloads RapidJSON, generates a build system with CMake, and builds the project.
